text:
An official website of the United States government
Here’s how you know
NIST In Focus
Dig Deeper into NIST Research
From shrinking technology to better understanding how we measure things to learning about how NIST helps preserve some of American history's biggest moments, the sites listed below provide a deep dive into some of NIST's most impactful — and memorable — work.
